scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ./.env.local ]; then sh ./scripts/with-env-local.sh pnpm -C apps/web dev; else ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C apps/web dev; fi'
scripts.dev:local: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C apps/web dev'
scripts.build: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C apps/web build'
scripts.db:generate: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db prisma generate'
scripts.db:migrate: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db prisma migrate dev --name init'
scripts.migrate:neon: sh ./scripts/with-env-local.sh pnpm -C packages/db prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.db:status: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db prisma migrate status'
scripts.db:seed: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db prisma db seed'
scripts.seed:neon: sh ./scripts/with-env-local.sh pnpm -C packages/db prisma db seed
scripts.proof:seed-olympiad: sh ./scripts/with-env-local.sh pnpm -C apps/web exec tsx src/scripts/seed-olympiad-problems.ts
scripts.proof:eval: sh ./scripts/with-env-local.sh pnpm -C apps/web exec tsx src/scripts/proof-eval.ts
scripts.db:studio: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db prisma studio'
scripts.aops:import: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C packages/db aops:import "$@"' --
scripts.pdf:backfill:legacy-official: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C apps/web pdf:backfill:legacy-official "$@"' --
scripts.pdf:backfill-generated: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C apps/web pdf:backfill-generated "$@"' --
scripts.pdf:render-verify: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; set -a; . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; pnpm -C apps/web pdf:render-verify "$@"' --
scripts.pdf:validate-searchable: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; node --import tsx scripts/validate-searchable.ts "$@"' --
scripts.papers:materialize-last10: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; node --import tsx scripts/materialize-last10.ts "$@"' --
scripts.paper:from-topic-url: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; node --import tsx scripts/paper-from-topic-url.ts "$@"' --
scripts.ingest:bulk: sh -c 'ORIG_DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-}; if [ -f ./.env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; if [ -n "$ORIG_DATABASE_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$ORIG_DATABASE_URL"; fi; node --import tsx scripts/bulk-ingest-aops.ts "$@"' --
